title: Ten MCP tools registered — exceeds required capability areas
evidence: src/server.ts:60-320 registers search_matches, head_to_head, team_stats, search_players, club_squad, standings, season_summary, aggregate_stats, biggest_wins, top_scoring_teams
suggestion: No action needed — additional tools (club_squad, season_summary, biggest_wins, top_scoring_teams) add value beyond spec

title: Thorough team-name normalization with alias rules and accent stripping
evidence: src/data/normalize.ts:74-91 ALIAS_RULES handles Vasco/Athletico/Atletico variants; stripAccents at line 31
suggestion: Excellent data-quality handling for the multi-source dataset

title: Match deduplication across overlapping CSV sources
evidence: src/queries/common.ts:75-99 dedupeMatches() prevents inflated counts from 5 match files covering overlapping competitions/seasons
suggestion: Critical for accurate statistics given the overlapping datasets

title: Run not scored in retort.db — fallback test execution used
evidence: retort.db has no experiment_runs row for language=typescript, model=claude-opus-4-8, tooling=beads, replicate=1; tests run directly via npx vitest run
suggestion: Consider scoring beads-tooling runs in the experiment pipeline
